reason: The canonical queue contains no active frontier_research item. Additive history showed R-010 completed, so this records the next non-duplicative completed slice without overwriting shared state.

proposed_item.action: Classify Web Audio AudioPlaybackStats underrun and latency evidence without conflating playback-path quality with audibility.

progress.finding: The 2026-07-13 Web Audio 1.1 editor draft defines AudioPlaybackStats for underrun and latency evidence, with at-most-once-per-second updates restricted to a running context plus visibility or microphone-permission conditions.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated Node v22.16.0 runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files.

proposed_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should feature-detect AudioContext.playbackStats, sample it only during a bounded visible diagnostic session, wait at least one specification update interval, and fuse the classification with render-position, route, pulse, and human/device-level evidence. Do not request microphone permission solely for statistics access.
